policy.kernel_verified: Exact stated theorem compiled in Lean without sorryAx.
policy.proof_candidate: A complete mathematical or formal proof candidate exists but novelty or external review is pending.
policy.partial: Substantial lemmas, reductions, or computations exist, but the target theorem is incomplete.
policy.open: No complete proof or disproof is claimed.
